refTarget: HTMLDivElement stable wrapper for enhanced and native presentations
nativeProps: Curated field, form, popup, and collection props; enhanced behavior remains owned by React Aria and native behavior by the browser

props.name: entries
props.type: readonly CollectionEntry<T>[] from the shared model

compositionPolicy.selection: Select is deliberately single-selection. Multiple selection belongs to Listbox and the separate multi-select component, avoiding enhanced/native parity splits.
compositionPolicy.enhanced: React Aria owns the non-editable trigger, hidden native form control, popup, listbox keyboard model, focus restoration, and validation state.
compositionPolicy.native: presentation=native renders the canonical NativeSelect and text-only option/optgroup model. It is explicit, never user-agent switched, and is recommended when simple platform/mobile picker behavior is preferable.
compositionPolicy.collection: Enhanced and native presentations validate and serialize the same stable keys and localized textValue records.
compositionPolicy.virtualization: Enhanced presentation may window large collections through the same measured ListLayout contract; native presentation rejects virtualization because the platform owns option rendering.
